name: Crab Cakes with Tomato Dill Sauce
recipeIngredient: cooked, cartilage removed and meat flaked
1 1/2 teaspoons fresh dill weed, or 1/2 tsp dried tabasco sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except Tomato Dill Sauce and oil.
2. Shape mixture into 8 patties, each about 2 1/2 inches in diameter.
3. Cover and refrigerate about 1 1/2 hours or until firm.
4. Prepare Tomato Dill Sauce; cover and refrigerate until serving.
5. Heat oil in a 10 inch skillet over medium high heat.
6. Cook patties in oil about 5 minutes, turning once, until light brown on both sides.
7. Serve with sauce.
